item.title: Sanofi Nuvaxovid COVID-19 Vaccine
item.description:
• Summary: Sanofi is promoting the tolerability of its COVID-19 vaccine Nuvaxovid based on a head-to-head trial against Moderna's mRNA vaccine. The data suggests comparable or improved safety profiles, potentially positioning Nuvaxovid as a viable alternative in the vaccine market.
  • MoAs: Nuvaxovid is a protein subunit vaccine that uses recombinant SARS-CoV-2 spike protein to elicit an immune response against COVID-19.
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
